data.title: Unisound AI Technology Announces EGM and Closure of Register
data.description:
Unisound AI Technology Co., Ltd. ( (HK:9678) ) has issued an update.

Unisound AI Technology Co., Ltd. has announced the closure of its register of members to prepare for the 2025 Second Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) scheduled for October 17, 2025. This move is significant for shareholders as it determines eligibility to attend and vote at the EGM, impacting the company’s governance and decision-making processes.

More about Unisound AI Technology Co., Ltd.

Unisound AI Technology Co., Ltd. is a company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the artificial intelligence industry. It focuses on developing AI technologies and solutions, catering to various market needs.

data.title: Mobile-health Network Solutions Approves Key Proposals at September EGM
data.description:
Mobile-health Network Solutions Class A ( (MNDR) ) just unveiled an update.

On September 11, 2025, Mobile-health Network Solutions held its Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM), where shareholders voted on key proposals. The meeting saw a significant turnout, with 85.36% of voting power represented. Shareholders approved two major proposals: the share consolidation and the Amended and Restated Memorandum and Articles of Association. These approvals are likely to impact the company’s operational structure and governance, potentially enhancing its market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (MNDR) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mobile-health Network Solutions Class A stock, see the MNDR Stock Forecast page.

The combination of these factors suggests caution for potential investors.

data.title: Guinness VCT Plc Launches New Share Subscription Offer with Dividend Prospects
data.description:
Guinness VCT Plc ( (GB:GVCT) ) has shared an update.

Guinness VCT Plc has announced the publication of a prospectus and circular for a new share subscription offer aimed at raising up to £10 million, with an additional £5 million available through over-allotment. The offer includes early investment incentives and discounts for existing investors, and is contingent upon shareholder approval of related party transactions at a general meeting. The company also plans to declare a maiden dividend in early 2026, subject to certain conditions, which could enhance investor returns and strengthen its market position.

More about Guinness VCT Plc

Guinness VCT Plc operates in the financial services industry, focusing on venture capital trusts. The company offers investment opportunities primarily through subscription offers for ordinary shares, targeting investors interested in venture capital and growth investments.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: China Wacan Group Reports Impairment Losses Due to Payment Delays
data.description:
The latest update is out from Hands Form Holdings Limited ( (HK:1920) ).

China Wacan Group Company Limited has announced supplemental information regarding impairment losses under the expected credit loss model for two construction projects in Chai Wan and Kwun Tong. The company faced delays in payment from a customer, leading to a recognition of impairment losses of approximately HK$15.7 million and HK$3.6 million. The valuation was based on a report by an independent valuer, categorizing receivables into three risk groups, with Group C being considered defaulted due to significant overdue payments and changes in debtor credit ratings.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1920) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hands Form Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:1920 Stock Forecast page.

More about Hands Form Holdings Limited

data.title: Reach plc’s EBT Acquires Shares to Support Employee Plans
data.description:
An update from Reach plc ( (GB:RCH) ) is now available.

Reach plc announced that its Employee Benefit Trust (EBT) has acquired 452,755 Ordinary Shares to manage dilution from share plans, as previously confirmed to shareholders. This move is part of the company’s strategy to support employee share options and restricted share releases, enhancing employee benefits and aligning with corporate governance practices.

data.title: Origin Agritech Announces Board Changes with New Appointments and Resignations
data.description:
Origin Agritech ( (SEED) ) has provided an announcement.

On September 12, 2025, Origin Agritech Limited announced the appointment of Dr. Changqing Mao and Mr. Siu Laam Hau as independent board members, bringing extensive experience in agriculture and corporate finance, respectively. Concurrently, the company saw the resignation of Ms. Fei Wang, Dr. Michael Trimble, Dr. Min Lin, and Mr. Chi Kin Cheng from their positions as directors, with Mr. Cheng continuing as Chief Financial Officer. These changes in the board composition may influence the company’s strategic direction and governance.

data.title: One Health Group PLC Reports Successful AGM and Continued Growth
data.description:
One Health Group PLC ( (GB:OHGR) ) has issued an update.

One Health Group PLC announced that all resolutions were passed at its recent Annual General Meeting. The company continues to experience strong growth, having provided care to over 17,000 new patients through more than 42,000 consultations and 7,000 surgical procedures in the past year. This development reflects One Health’s strategic focus on addressing under-supplied NHS patient needs and leveraging growth drivers such as an ageing demographic and increasing obesity rates, particularly in spine and orthopaedics.

More about One Health Group PLC

One Health Group PLC is an independent provider of NHS-funded medical procedures, specializing in orthopaedics, spine, general surgery, gynaecology, and urology. The company operates through a network of community-based outreach clinics and surgical locations, focusing on areas with high population density and low private medical insurance. It collaborates with NHS consultants and professionals to deliver services primarily in Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, and Leicestershire.

Average Trading Volume: 12,615

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Zensun Enterprises Faces Liquidity Challenges Amid Note Delisting
data.description:
Zensun Enterprises Limited ( (HK:0185) ) has provided an update.

Zensun Enterprises Limited announced the delisting of its 7.0% senior notes due 2025 from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange following their maturity. The company has been unable to meet its payment obligations for these notes due to ongoing liquidity pressures exacerbated by the challenging conditions in the Chinese real estate market. Despite these difficulties, Zensun remains committed to maintaining normal business operations and is actively working to improve its financial position through property sales and other measures.

More about Zensun Enterprises Limited

Zensun Enterprises Limited is a company incorporated in Hong Kong, operating within the Chinese real estate industry. The company, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on property development and sales, facing significant challenges due to market contractions affecting cash flows and pre-sales volumes.

Average Trading Volume: 1,578,107

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$220M

data.title: Eltel Secures EUR 38 Million Contract for Finnish Data Center
data.description:
Eltel AB ( (SE:ELTEL) ) has provided an announcement.

Eltel AB has secured a EUR 38 million contract to build grid connections for DayOne’s new data center in Lahti, Finland. The project includes the delivery of a 110 kV substation and cabling to the Lahti Energia grid, with completion expected by early 2027. This contract highlights Eltel’s expertise in integrating power and communication services for data centers, reinforcing its position in the data center market with a focus on reliability and sustainability.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:ELTEL) stock is a Hold with a SEK9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eltel AB stock, see the SE:ELTEL Stock Forecast page.

More about Eltel AB

Eltel is a leading service provider for critical infrastructure in the Nordics, with operations also in Germany and Lithuania. The company specializes in services and turnkey solutions for communication and power networks, as well as renewable energy. Eltel is headquartered in Sweden and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm.

Average Trading Volume: 114,279

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK1.43B
